## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-powered content creation capabilities for Leapsome's marketing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a hybrid approach combining AI workflows with human expertise for high-quality, scalable content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Their process includes an 8-week strategy sprint followed by daily publishing, with a focus on AI search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [GrowthX's platform features sophisticated workflows for research, fact-checking, and content generation, tailored to client needs](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Reporting and analytics are provided through Looker dashboards, with plans to expand platform capabilities for client use](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach and Capabilities

  - [Founded by Marcel (ex-IBM, HashiCorp, Scale), focusing on organic content engines](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Serves 70+ clients, primarily B2B software companies](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise (managing director, editor, content manager)](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint, followed by 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Can handle editorial and programmatic content, including compliance-sensitive topics](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Potential for multilingual content (confirmed Spanish, investigating German)](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Develops rich artifacts (personas, content OS, topic clusters) for hyper-relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Uses proprietary AI workflow engine for brief creation, research, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Integrates knowledge base and specific tools for deeper research](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Allows for customization and evolution of workflows based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Handles end-to-end process, including staging and publishing in client's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Augment Code: Created 100+ guides, 3x blog traffic, strong AI search presence](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Town (accounting): High-accuracy content creation for tax-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Lovable: Demonstrated content OS and topic cluster approach](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Provides Looker dashboards for tracking content performance](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Uses tools like Scrunch for SEO analytics](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Plans to expand platform capabilities for direct client use and integration](https://fathom.video/share/VNrjkwPEDGxrNHv71oNTVxZQmvSPsWTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
